comment: My son settled in within a week. Class teacher sends clear weekly notes and homework is manageable.
Strong reading program and a nice library corner. Morning drop-off traffic can be tight.
Teachers are patient with first graders and encourage speaking confidence in class.
Good academics but the school app notifications are sometimes delayed.
replyText: Thanks for sharing this. We are updating the app notification service this term.

comment: The math lab activities are fun and practical. My daughter enjoys going to school every day.
Clean classrooms and supportive staff. Would like one more parent teacher meeting per term.
Great balance of studies, sports, and art. Assembly sessions are very well organized.
The bus arrived late multiple times in one month. Communication from transport team needs improvement.
replyText: We are sorry about the delays. Route timings were revised and tracking is now enabled.

comment: Teacher feedback is specific and useful. School canteen menu has healthy options.
Excellent phonics support for early learners. My child now reads bedtime stories confidently.
Good playground and safe campus. Security at gate is strict and reassuring.
My child needed extra writing support and the remedial sessions helped a lot.
Teachers are good but dismissal process is slow during rainy days.
School celebrates festivals with educational context. Kids learn values and cultural respect.
Science corner projects are creative. Wish there was a little more shade in the waiting area.
Teachers respond quickly on the parent portal and concerns are handled politely.
Fees changed mid term and explanation was not clear. Very disappointing experience.
replyText: We regret the confusion and have now sent a detailed fee circular to all parents.

comment: Nice music and dance periods. Annual day practice was managed without affecting regular classes.
The school counselor is approachable and helped my child with exam anxiety.
Reasonable class size and active participation from teachers in each period.
Excellent handwriting improvement plan. We saw progress in less than two months.
Curriculum is fine but classroom fans in Block B need maintenance.
Sports day was fantastic and every child got a chance to participate.
Homework policy is balanced and not stressful for younger children.
Very caring class teacher who notices each child and motivates them individually.
School ERP for attendance works well. Lunch break supervision is good.
Admission team promised call backs that never happened. Initial communication felt unprofessional.
replyText: We apologize for the missed follow up. The admissions desk has a new response SLA in place.

comment: Library reading challenge motivated my child to read more books at home.
Good school overall with polite support staff and neat classrooms.
Best primary school in our area for foundational learning and child friendly teachers.
